devices.name: AR24NSWXCWKNCV
devices.feature_text: The indoor unit shall feature Wind-Free™ mode*. In cooling mode, as room temperature nears set temperature, the unit will close its louver and will disperse air into the space through over 20,000 micro-holes on the front of the indoor unit preventing cold air drafts on occupants.

devices.name: AR18DXDABWKNCV

devices.name: AR24DXFAMWKNCV
devices.feature_text: Auto changeover, Auto Clean Function, Freeze. Wash Function, MAX mode to quickly reach set temperature, Good'sleep mode,.

devices.name: AR24DXKAPWKNCV
devices.feature_text:
The indoor unit shall feature WindFree™* mode. When activated in cooling 
mode the unit will close its louver and will disperse air into the space through 
thousands of micro-holes on the front of the indoor unit preventing cold air drafts 
on occupants. 
▪ The indoor unit shall feature a PM1.0 electrostatic precipitator filter capable of 
capturing dust particles as small as 1 micron. 
▪ The indoor unit shall be capable of sensing dust particulate matter in the air 
stream and displaying the appropriate measured data on the unit’s display. 
▪ The system shall have a built-in Wi-Fi adapter as standard to allow control and 
monitoring using the Samsung SmartThings app.
▪ Outdoor unit shall provide 208/230V power to the indoor unit via 14 AWG X 3 
interconnect power cable.

The system shall feature comfort humidity control. Utilizing an integral 
humidity sensor, the system optimizes the indoor unit coil temperature

18,000 air holes provide 360 surround air purification coverage.

Equipped with a cylindrical H13 HEPA filter which purifiers larger areas than competing air purifiers.
Equipped with UV-C Light
Miro’s ‘Total Care System’ is equipped with six sensors to analyze and adapt to your environment. ‘Total Care System’ senses temperature, humidity, dust, gas, filter life, and light.
All purchases made during the promotional period are non-refundable.

devices.name: Bespoke Cube Air Purifier
devices.feature_text: Samsung's BESPOKE Cube air purifier offers a sleek design and excellent filtration (with an emphasis on pet-friendly households), provides detailed insights into your air, and operates stealthily quiet, but its coverage range is not as far as competitors and regular maintenance is recommended.

devices.name: Cube Smart Air Purifier
devices.feature_text:
Powerful 4-layer filtration senses, cleanses and refreshes every corner of your room through 360° air suction with 4-layer filter technology:​

True HEPA-13 Filter captures 99.99% of the harmful PM10 & PM2.5 pollutants
Pre-Filter combats pet fur and dander, dust mites, cigarette smoke, etc.​
Silver Nano Particle Coating fights airborne bacteria and viruses​
Activated Carbon Filter removes odors, smoke and cooking smells​

devices.name: Bluesky Compact Air Purifier
devices.feature_text:
Compact design quickly cleans up to 216sqft in 30 minutes
Two button control & 3 fan speeds
Place anywhere with the 360° design
Variety of washable pre-filter colors designed to blend into your spa

devices.name: UBD-M9700
devices.feature_text: With high dynamic range (HDR) content, scenes burst with vivid color, stunning contrast and deep detail. With smart connectivity, content streaming to mobile devices, and Bluetooth wireless streaming, the UBD-M9700 is a true entertainment hub.

devices.name: UBD-M9500
devices.feature_text: Samsung’s Ultra HD Blu-ray Player gives you higher picture quality, and colour range of usual Blu-ray players, and sharper contrast with HDR technology.

devices.name: Smart Bridge MZ1
devices.feature_text: Smart Bridge MZ1: Zigbee to Matter integration, expanded compatibility, and enhanced user experience in one compact solution.

devices.name: SM-R400NZWWXAR
devices.feature_text: • Hear crystal-clear translations through your Galaxy Buds, whether in-person or over the phone. 1, 2 • Listen in comfort throughout your day with a newly redesigned wingtip that keeps your Buds securely in place. • Hear what you want - not what you don’t - with Active Noise Cancellation.

devices.name: SM-R400NZWNXAR
devices.feature_text: • Hear crystal-clear translations through your Galaxy Buds, whether in-person or over the phone. 1, 2 • Listen in comfort throughout your day with a newly redesigned wingtip that keeps your Buds securely in place. • Hear what you want - not what you don’t - with Active Noise Cancellation.

devices.name: Galaxy Buds3
devices.feature_text: Introducing 24-bit/96kHz support on open-ear buds design - so the quality of sound is preserved from the recording to the moment it plays in your ears - matching quality of sound you'd expect to hear in a studio

devices.name: SM-R400NZAALTA
devices.feature_text: • Hear crystal-clear translations through your Galaxy Buds, whether in-person or over the phone. 1, 2 • Listen in comfort throughout your day with a newly redesigned wingtip that keeps your Buds securely in place. • Hear what you want - not what you don’t - with Active Noise Cancellation.

devices.name: Galaxy Buds FE
devices.feature_text: Listen in comfort throughout your day with a newly redesigned wingtip that keeps your Buds securely in place. Hear what you want - not what you don't - with Active Noise Cancellation. Control your Buds FE quickly and easily with clearly defined areas for tapping and gripping.

devices.name: SM-R630NZWALTA
devices.feature_text: Redefine your listening experience — featuring our first-ever planar tweeter and debut of dual amp on Galaxy Buds. Capture a high range of intricate details with enhanced 2-way speaker. Minimize distortion with our powerful dual amp. Hear each note in crystal-clear clarity, with 24-bit CODEC. Take your listening experience to the next level with Galaxy AI-boosted noise control and real-time interpretation. See your Galaxy Buds in a new light.

devices.name: SM-R400NZWALTA
devices.feature_text: With their compact and ergonomic style, Galaxy Buds FE are designed to deliver an exceptional listening experience. Block out unwanted noise with Active Noise Cancellation (ANC), customize the fit with various tips, and sync seamlessly with your Samsung Galaxy devices. Meet your perfect daily audio companion.

devices.name: SM-R530NZAFXAR
devices.feature_text: The Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 have all the drawbacks of the Apple AirPods with their design, though they offer Samsung phone owners a fair amount of upside. However, because the fit is so crucial to how personal audio products work, these earbuds will likely fall flat for a lot of people.

devices.name: SM-R400NZAWXAR
devices.feature_text: Meet Galaxy Buds FE, your new favorite everyday audio experience. Buds FE fit comfortably into your day, combining your favorite Galaxy innovations on the go. With their ear-friendly design and a variety of wingtip options, your Buds stay in place securely and comfortably — you might even forget you’re wearing them. Lose yourself in the sounds you love with Active Noise Cancellation and Ambient Sound. Plus, Buds FE connect seamlessly with your Galaxy devices — get ready for effortless pairing from your phone to your Tab to your laptop. It’s easy to keep up with Buds FE too. Get a notification if you leave a Bud behind, and locate it easily with SmartThings Find.* Enjoy your favorite audio experiences throughout your day with Galaxy Buds FE. Now you can hear translations through your Buds while on calls or during face-to-face conversations.

devices.name: SM-R530NZAALTA
devices.feature_text: Discover the details in your favorite songs. Re-engineered with an angled design to bring sound closer to your ears. Feel the beat with a new 11mm speaker for strong, dynamic sound. Hear the distinct timbre and clarity in each note with 24-bit CODEC, giving you the ultimate Hi-Fi sound experience. Fine-tune the details with Galaxy AI enhancements for ANC and real-time translation that give you an edge.

devices.name: SM-R630NZAMXAR
devices.feature_text: These earbuds feature active noise cancellation technology, making them perfect for blocking out distractions and enjoying your music or calls without any external noise. The built-in microphone allows you to make and receive calls with ease, while the touch control feature gives you the ability to control your music playback with simple taps.

devices.name: SM-R530NZWWXAR
devices.feature_text: Redesigned for life on the go. Meet the Galaxy Buds designed to stay as active as you are, giving you the sound you love - Galaxy Buds3. Sound is a big part of your life, and your Buds3 provide all-day comfort for your most active days - from catching up with friends on calls to listening to your favorite podcast during your daily commute to feeling every note of your latest playlist while walking the dog. We redesigned Buds3 to keep up with everything you do. These Buds feature improved software that allows you to add a personalized touch. Get your sound your way - pause music, skip songs, accept calls and more - with Intuitive Touch Control. Buds3 also remove distracting background noise with Active Noise Cancellation so it’s just you and your sound - nothing else.

devices.name: SM-R630NZWWXAR
devices.feature_text: Refreshed look. Revolutionary sound. Meet the new shape of sound — Galaxy Buds3 Pro — now completely redesigned with improved hardware to bring you deeper into your audio than ever before.* With Galaxy AI,* your Buds create the best listening experience by optimizing sound based on your surroundings and how you wear them — while providing a snug fit for all-day comfort, no matter what you do. Buds3 Pro get how much you love your audio. From jamming while cooking to listening to your favorite show on a crowded subway to taking a work call, your Buds will adjust to the different sounds around you using Adaptive Active Noise Cancellation so you always hear what’s important. Plus, they’re packed with features to create a convenient listening experience — from auto-switching* your audio between your Galaxy phone and your Galaxy PC to immersing you in the latest TV shows with 360 Audio, now available on Samsung TVs.* And it doesn’t stop there — Buds make perfect companions for your Galaxy phone as you travel. Real-Time Interpreter with Galaxy AI* allows you to speak like a local as your phone translates speech right in your Buds so you never miss a word from your local tour guide. No matter what you listen to or how you listen, we’ve redesigned our Buds to give you the most immersive audio experience with Galaxy Buds3 Pro.

devices.name: Galaxy Buds3 Pro
devices.feature_text: Redefine your listening experience. Hear each note in crystal-clear clarity, with 24-bit CODEC. Minimize distortion with our first-ever, dual amp on Galaxy Buds. Capture a high range of intricate details with enhanced 2-way speaker — featuring a planar tweeter, a first on Galaxy Buds. Take your listening experience to the next level with Galaxy AI-boosted Noise Control and real-time interpretation. See your Buds in a new light.

devices.name: SM-R630NZWMXAR
devices.feature_text: Plus, they’re packed with features to create a convenient listening experience from auto-switching* your audio between your Galaxy phone and your Galaxy PC to immersing you in the latest TV shows with 360 Audio, now available on Samsung TVs.* And it doesn’t stop there Buds make perfect companions for your Galaxy phone as you travel. Real-Time Interpreter with Galaxy AI* allows you to speak like a local as your phone translates speech right in your Buds so you never miss a word from your local tour guide. No matter what you listen to or how you listen, we’ve redesigned our Buds to give you the most immersive audio experience with Galaxy Buds3 Pro.

Sound is a big part of your life, and your Buds3 provide all-day comfort for your most active days from catching up with friends on calls to listening to your favorite podcast during your daily commute to feeling every note of your latest playlist while walking the dog.

devices.name: SM-R630NZWFXAR
devices.feature_text: Audio Features: Equipped with Bluetooth 5.4, the Buds 3 Pro support SSC HiFi and UHQ audio codecs, delivering 24bit/96KHz audio for superior sound quality. They also include 360 Audio with Direct Multi-Channel for an immersive listening experience, especially when paired with Galaxy devices.

devices.name: Nest Cam Indoor
devices.rooms: Entrance; Living Room; Nursery; Garage; Backyard
devices.feature_text:
24/7 live video: 130° wide-angle view and all-glass lens let you look after home in 1080p HD, day and night.
Alerts and snapshots: When Nest Cam detects activity, it can send a phone alert or email with a photo of the event.
Quick, easy setup: Plug in Nest Cam and download the Nest app to get started. No hub needed.
Talk & Listen: Nest Cam has a built-in speaker and microphone, and lets you talk and listen through the app. Speak up to get someone's attention, or tell the dog to get off the couch.; Monthly subscription required for access to full suite of features
Night vision done right: See the whole room at night - not just a limited spotlight view.; Comes with a free Nest Aware trial: Get intelligent alerts and continuous cloud recording. Create Activity Zones for more precise alerts. Make and share custom clips or timelapses. And more.

devices.name: Nest Cam IQ Outdoor

devices.feature_text: Nest Cam IQ Outdoor is a weatherproof, tamper-resistant, intelligent camera that's part of the Nest Home security ecosystem. It is expensive, but it might be worth it if you want a durable, weatherproof camera with facial recognition. The camera can detect a person up to 50 feet away and alert you with a photo of who's there. The Cam IQ includes an 8MP sensor with 12x digital zoom, video resolution of 1080p, and night vision.

devices.name: Nest Cam (outdoor or indoor, battery)
devices.rooms: Entrance; Living Room; Nursery; Garage; Backyard
devices.feature_text: Nest Cam has built-in intelligence and can tell the difference between a person, animal, and vehicle and send alerts directly through the Google Home app[1], no subscription required Easily check in from anywhere 24/7 with 1080p HDR video[1] with night vision, and see what you missed with 3 hours of free event video history[2]; add a Nest Aware subscription (sold separately) for up to 60 days of video history[3] If your Wi-Fi goes down or there’s a power outage, Nest Cam will store up to an hour of recorded events so you can see what you missed[4] Put Nest Cam anywhere, outside or in; it’s battery powered, so you don’t need to set it up near an outlet, and the magnetic mount makes installation effortless For continuous power and 24/7 video recording with Nest Aware Plus, add a weatherproof power cable or indoor stand with power cable (both sold separately) Set up Activity Zones to receive phone notifications about specific areas of your home and know when familiar faces arrive

devices.name: Spotlight Cam Wired
devices.rooms: Entrance; Living Room; Nursery; Garage; Backyard
devices.feature_text: Ring Spotlight Cam Wired is the first plug-and-play HD security camera with built-in spotlights, two-way talk and a siren alarm. It lets you watch over your property from your phone, tablet and pc. With Spotlight Cam Wired, you can create customizable motion zones that let you focus on the most important areas of your yard. When anyone enters your motion zones and triggers your motion sensors, you’ll get an instant alert on your phone, tablet and pc. Answer the alert, and you can see, hear and speak to people on your property from anywhere. Spotlight Cam Wired shines its lights and starts recording video as soon as motion is detected, and you can also use the free Ring app to control the camera, lights and siren right from your phone. It also comes with a free 30-day trial of Ring video recording, so you can review, save and share your videos at anytime with anyone. Spotlight Cam Wired plugs into standard power outlets for non-stop power, so you’ll never need to charge a battery. It also comes with all the tools you need to get your cam setup in just a few minutes. Ring Spotlight Cam Wired is available in either black or white, so you can pick a finish that matches your home and your style. With a weather-resistant design and infrared night vision, you can monitor your property at any time of the day, with or without the lights on.

devices.name: Indoor Cam (2nd Gen)
devices.rooms: Entrance; Living Room; Nursery; Garage; Backyard
devices.feature_text: Get the whole picture about what's happening at home, or keep the picture private by using the manual, removable Privacy Cover to turn off audio and video with a simple swivel. Versatile protection and personalised peace of mind - that’s Indoor Camera (2nd Gen). The ideal way to check in on your home from wherever you are, Indoor Camera (2nd Gen) is a versatile plug-in Security Camera, designed to go almost anywhere indoors.

devices.name: Spotlight Cam Pro
devices.rooms: Entrance; Living Room; Nursery; Garage; Backyard
devices.feature_text: Add some light to your outdoor security with Spotlight Cam Pro. Our most advanced spotlight camera harnesses the power of Ring Vision to deliver brilliant 2K clarity and color.1 Help provide pro-level security to key outdoor spaces with 3D Motion Detection, Bird’s Eye View, and Audio+. Learn more about power types.

This Dacor dishwasher uses AutoRelease™ to improve drying performance by up to 35% by releasing steam. With a large 14 place setting capacity and a silence rating of 42 dBA, you'll experience an impressively efficient and ultra-quiet wash. When you need additional space for utensils and culinary tools, the removable 3rd Rack allows for the perfect organization and clean. With Smart Control Wi-Fi, you can monitor performance and check cycle status through the convenience of your mobile device.

devices.name: Smart Lock (DB2)
devices.feature_text: Our smart home touchscreen motorized deadbolt lock is as satisfying to operate as it is to look at. Featuring a screen with no moving parts or buttons for a smooth, clean surface. Includes Bluetooth connectivity for One-Touch access, allowing you to simply touch the unit while your phone is nearby to open the lock. An optional Alfred Connect Wifi Bridge allows you to operate the lock remotely and adds Google Home Assistant or Alexa voice control support.

devices.name: Smart Lock (DB2-B)
devices.feature_text: Our keyed-entry lock option, allowing you to use a custom key as backup. Featuring an elegant key entry point with swivel cover and the same touchscreen operation as the DB2. Includes Bluetooth connectivity for One-Touch access, allowing you to simply touch the unit while your phone is nearby to open the lock. An optional Alfred Connect Wifi Bridge allows you to operate the lock remotely and adds Google Home Assistant or Alexa voice control support.

devices.name: Smart Lock Pro (Z-Wave)
devices.feature_text:
The August Smart Lock Pro is a security enabled Z-Wave Plus product that is capable of using encrypted Z-Wave Plus messages to communicate to other security enabled Z-Wave Plus products.

The August Smart Lock Pro must be used in conjunction with a Security Enabled Z-Wave Controller in order to fully utilize all implemented functions.

The August Smart Lock Pro can be operated in any Z-Wave network with other Z-Wave certified devices from other manufacturers. All non-battery operated nodes within the network will act as repeaters regardless of vendor to increase reliability of the network.

devices.name: Smart Lock (WiFi)
devices.feature_text:

• Replaces your old deadbolt

• Your existing keys still work and you can lock/unlock with your smartphone or Apple Watch and the August App

devices.name: Smart Lock Pro (WiFi)

Control your door and keep track of who comes and goes, all from your phone.
Send guest temporary keys from anywhere instantly from the August app.
Automatically locks your door behind you.
Certified Z-Wave Plus home product, the leading wireless technology for security and home control products.
Attaches to your existing deadbolt and installs in about 10 minutes.

Samsung's Large Capacity Smart Gas Dryer is equipped with Pet Care Dry Cycle which helps remove 97% of 3 unpleasant pet odors.* With Steam Sanitize+, removes 95% of pollen** from fabric, while Multi-Steam refreshes clothing and relaxes light wrinkles. With Wi-Fi connectivity, you can remotely start, stop, or delay your dryer from our simple-to-use SmartThings App.***
*Based on DOE 1.5kg load of wet laundry polluted with 3 gases: Isovaleraldehyde (food), Methyl Mercaptan (feces) and Nonanal (body).
**Testing based on Samsung internal protocols. Results provided to and interpreted by Intertek. Individual results may vary.
***Available on Android and iOS devices. A Wi-Fi connection and a Samsung account are required. Only monitoring enabled on Gas dryers for safety reasons.

devices.name: Home Energy Meter Gen5 2P, 200A
devices.feature_text:
Monitor and log whole-premises electricity consumption in real-time. Record how much electricity you spend by using Aeotec Home Energy Meter Gen5.  It’ll record up to 200 amps of your home’s electricity use in real-time with 99% accuracy. And it’ll share it with your Z-Wave gateway, you'll then be able to reduce how much those electronics are costing you.

A meter, that collects precise data of your power producers.

The Home Energy Meter can measure the overproduction of solar panels, wind turbines or other generators in your home grid. It is connected to max. 3 phases at your mains power connection. That allows to gather even the slightest overproduction, which would be feed in the grid from your power producers. Since it is more sufficient and economizing to use your own power instead of feeding it to the grid, the Home Energy Meter lets you automate your home to use as much of your power by yourself.

devices.name: fanSync

devices.name: In-Wall Smart Fan Control (Z-Wave)
devices.feature_text:
"Transform any home into a smart home with the GE Z-Wave Smart Fan Control. The in-wall fan control easily replaces any standard in-wall switch remotely controls a ceiling fan in your home and features a three-speed control system. Your home will be equipped with ultimate flexibility with the GE Z-Wave Smart Fan Control, capable of being used by itself or with up to four GR add-on switches. Screw terminal installation provides improved space efficiency when replacing existing switches and the integrated LED indicator light allows you to easily locate the switch in a dark room. The GE Z-Wave Smart Fan Control is compatible with any Z-Wave certified gateway, providing access to many popular home automation systems. Take control of your home lighting with GE Z-Wave Smart Lighting Controls!

Z-Wave is the world’s largest ecosystem of interoperable smart home products. Z-Wave lighting controls provide an easy-to-install and affordable system to control lighting and small appliances in your home. Add GE Z-Wave lighting controls to a Z-Wave certified gateway to access and control your home from anywhere in the world using your smartphone, tablet or computer as a home automation command center. Never worry if you accidentally left the lights on because you can turn them off remotely or program your lights to go on/off at specific times. Create customized lighting scenes for any occasion such as a “go to sleep” scene or a “movie night” scene. Give the illusion that someone is home by programming the lights to turn on/off while you are away—perfect for deterring crime and adding additional security!"

devices.name: MachForce 2 HPc Premium Garage Door Opener Screw Drive
devices.feature_text: Maximum opening speed: 12" per second*** - 2 times faster than chain or belt drive openers. Power and reliability: Delivers maximum lifting force and greater reliability. SmartSet™ programming: Push-button programming makes set up fast and easy.

devices.name: Wall Mount Smart Garage Door Opener- Direct Drive Side Mount with Wireless Wall Console, Battery Backup, and Alexa
devices.feature_text: The Genie wall mounted smart garage door opener eliminates the traditional rail design. This Genie wall mount garage door opener features the Aladdin Connect smart home control and works with Alexa and Google Assistant, and it includes an integrated battery backup. The battery backup makes this model compliant with California State Law SB-969, which requires all installed garage door openers in the state to have a battery backup. Enhanced safety features on the Genie smart wall mount garage door opener includes exclusive Safe-T-Pulse cable tension monitoring technology, which tests and confirms there is sufficient cable tension before lowering the door. This smart wall mount garage door opener easily attaches directly to the garage door's spring tube mounted high and to the side of the garage door. This design opens the space above where cars would park in your garage. Often referred to as a residential jackshaft garage door opener, this wall mount model also features a Genie wireless wall console, Bluetooth LED light, and remote garage door lock.

devices.name: Aladdin Connect Retrofit Kit

Control – confirm - monitor: the garage door from your smartphone

devices.name: ChainGlide Connect 1/2 HPc Garage Door Opener
devices.feature_text: The Genie ChainGlide Connect durable chain drive smart garage door opener that provides the ultimate combination of reliability and strength. This wifi garage door opener is packed with all of the latest technology at a reasonable price. The integrated Aladdin Connect Wifi smartphone technology allows your garage door to be part of your smart home. The Genie Aladdin Connect smartphone app is free and allows you to set up individual users through their own app and set up virtual keys to operate your garage door opener. It also has a GenieSense enabled DC motor that provides unmatched durability, making it the ideal choice to open most 7-foot high garage doors. The ChainGlide Connect, like all Genie garage door openers, comes equipped with Intellicode rolling code technology that prevents unauthorized persons from opening your garage door. You will also enjoy the added conveniences of 2 pre-programmed 3 button remotes for quicker set-up, and a wall control panel with an independent light button and vacation lock for added security. The Genie Safe-T-Beam garage door safety sensors ensure your family’s safety and help prevent accidents with an infrared beam of light across the door opening. The ChainGlide Connect smart garage door opener is supported by our team of US-based technical support representatives available by phone or chat.

devices.name: 1¼ HP Quiet Belt Drive Garage Door Opener with LED, Battery Backup and Aladdin Connect
devices.feature_text: Control your Genie smart garage door opener from anywhere with the Aladdin Connect smartphone app, Amazon Alexa or Google Assistant. You can also monitor if your door is open or closed plus give virtual keys to anyone you select with rules that you can set to down to the hour when this person can open and close your garage.

devices.name: Stealth750 Essentials - 1-1/4 HPc Belt Drive Garage Door Opener with Battery Back-Up - Plus Aladdin Connect & LED light bulbs
devices.feature_text: The StealthDrive 750 belt drive garage door opener is an ultra-quiet garage door opener with a steel-reinforced belt, making it the ideal choice for homeowners where sound could be an issue. This garage door opener has a powerful DC motor with GenieSense technology standard. For extra safety and added convenience, this Genie garage door opener features an integrated battery backup. That battery backup will power the garage door opener for up to 50 cycles when the main power is out. This transition from home power to running on the battery happens instantly when the main power is out. Like all Genie garage door openers, the StealthDrive 750 comes equipped with Intellicode rolling code technology that prevents unauthorized persons from opening your garage door. This garage door opener includes many accessories for safety and convenience. Included are two pre-programmed 3-button garage door opener remotes, a wireless keypad and a multi-function wall console which provides you with a light control button and a vacation lock. The Genie Safe-T-Beam garage door safety sensors ensure your family’s safety with an infrared beam of light across the door opening.

Using the free WEMO App for Android, iOS, and Kindle, you can dim lights, turn them on or off, and control them individually or as a group. You can also use the app to create a custom schedule to turn lights on and off at specified times-or allow them to be turned on and off randomly to simulate occupancy - a nice safety feature when you're traveling and want to give the appearance of being home. WEMO Smart LED Bulbs give off a bright, warm glow similar to a 60-watt incandescent bulb but use less energy, making them a smart addition to your home. devices.name: Bulb (A19)
devices.feature_text: The term A19 is used to describe the overall shape and dimensions of a light bulb. It has been used since the era of incandescent light bulbs, and now CFL and LED light bulbs continue to use the same term.

devices.name: TRÅDFRI LED bulb GU10 400 lumen, white spectrum
devices.feature_text:
With a smart LED bulb, you can adapt your lighting to different activities, for example, a warmer light for dinner and a brighter, colder light for working.
LED light panels or LED light doors will react in the same way – dim, switch off, turn on, and switch from warm to cold light in 3 steps.
When you add a gateway and IKEA Home smart app, you can create several groups of light sources and control them in different ways.
The LED light source consumes up to 85% less energy and lasts 20 times longer than incandescent bulbs.
Package's: 1 x LED bulb GU10 400 lumen, wireless dimmable white spectrum

devices.name: J6AI Smart Home Downlight
devices.feature_text:
A LED light fixture that not only illuminates a room, but also locks the doors, schedules appointments, adjusts your thermostat, tells your family dinner is ready, runs the vacuum, reads you a book, dims the lights for movie night… the list is endless.*

Juno AI controls any smart home device that works with Alexa. And it’s virtually invisible in your ceiling… so say goodbye to countertop clutter and crank up the music.

devices.name: WAFER
devices.feature_text: The Juno® Smart Wafer Downlight Series is the perfect way to get connected with your smart home lighting solution. Smart Wafer Downlight Series uses Bluetooth or Zigbee to pair to your mobile device or compatible smart home hubs and is certified with SmartThings, Alexa and Google Home platforms once installed. When paired with a compatible smart home hub you can enable voice control, time schedules, and groups to control the lighting throughout your home. Once installed, it's simple and easy to customize your lighting with tunable white color control (2700K to 5000K), dimming down to 1% to set the perfect mood, and on/off control.

devices.name: Juno connect
devices.feature_text:
The Smart LED Trim Kit with RGBW color changing functionality is the perfect way to get connected with a smart home lighting solution. Once connected to any Apple or Android phone using Bluetooth® or Zigbee, the Smart RetroBasics downlight can be controlled either via voice command or through an app.

Compatible apps and smart home hubs include Amazon® Alexa, Google Home or Samsung® SmartThings. Once installed, easily control and customize your lighting to on/off, fine-tune the color temperatures from a warm 2700K to daylight 5000K, or choose from a full color spectrum of RGB color options. Plus, dimming abilities (down to 1%, perfect for use as a nightlight) and groupings all driven straight from your mobile device.

devices.name: JSTBC
devices.feature_text: The Juno® Smart JSBTC Surface Mount Disk Light Series is the perfect way to get connected with your smart home lighting solution. Smart JSBTC Surface Mount Disk Light Series uses Bluetooth® or Zigbee to pair to your mobile device or compatible smart home hubs and works with Samsung® SmartThings, Amazon® Alexa and Google Home platforms once installed. When paired with a compatible smart home hub you can enable voice control, time schedules, and groups to control the lighting throughout your home. Once installed, it's simple and easy to customize your lighting with tunable white color control (2700K to 5000K), dimming down to 1% to set the perfect mood, and on/off control.

devices.name: Speaker Light
devices.feature_text: The J6SLC LED Smart Speaker Downlight with RGB color changing functionality is the perfect way to get connected with a smart home lighting solution. Using Bluetooth™ or Zigbee, the J6SCL can be controlled either via voice command, with customized time schedules or within the app. Compatible apps and smart home hubs include Amazon® Alexa, Samsung® SmartThings and Google Home platforms. Once installed and connected, the J6SLC provides endless customization options allowing for easy control of lighting throughout an entire home. Easily control and customize your lighting to on/off, fine-tune the color temperatures from soft white 2700K to daylight 5000K or choose from a full color spectrum of RGB color options to set the mood. Plus, dimming down to 1% (perfect for use as a nightlight) and grouping capabilities for unlimited smart home automations. Additionally, add music to any environment by wireless streaming audio from any Bluetooth™ enabled device.

devices.name: LIFX Spot
devices.feature_text: Just another spot light? No, a LIFX SuperColor smart LED spot light. This is unlike any spotlight you've ever seen. Not only can it illuminate your landscape with classic warm ambience, but it can shift into vibrant color and dynamic motion that will transform your garden into a wonderland.

devices.name: LIFX Path Square
devices.feature_text: Just another path light? No, a LIFX SuperColor LED path light. This is unlike any low voltage landscape light you've ever seen. Not only can it illuminate your outdoor paths with classic warm ambience, but it can shift into vibrant color and dynamic motion that will transform your garden into a wonderland. Each smart path light has six addressable color zones, creating unique tones and casting reflections that feel like, well, magic.

devices.name: LIFX Path Round
devices.feature_text: Just another path light? No, a LIFX SuperColor LED path light. This is unlike any low voltage landscape light you've ever seen. Not only can it illuminate your outdoor paths with classic warm ambience, but it can shift into vibrant color and dynamic motion that will transform your garden into a wonderland. Each smart path light has six addressable color zones, creating unique tones and casting reflections that feel like, well, magic.

devices.name: LIFX Color PAR38
devices.feature_text: The LIFX SuperColor Flood Light is the smart LIFX PAR light for indoors and outdoors. Can this light be a Can Light? Yes, it can. Can it be a Flood Light? Yes, it can. Can it change millions of colors? Yes, it can. Can it take rain, hail or shine? Yes, siree it can. The LIFX SuperColor Flood Light is a modern, powerful bulb for every space, inside and out.

devices.name: LIFX Ceiling
devices.feature_text: Be transported with brand new lighting experiences like you’ve never seen before. Choose from a library of custom designed FX, from an overhead sky with passing clouds, to forrest canopies, abstract art and dynamic visual effects, to suit your mood.

devices.name: LIFX Tube
devices.feature_text: Create light that looks "fire". Literally. Or like lava, a sunset, a jungle canopy or a melted rainbow in a bottle... Whatever you're into. And for the rare individual not interested in those, you can use the ultra-broad industry leading range of white tones. They're pretty hot too.

devices.name: LIFX Permanent Outdoor
devices.feature_text: Be the brightest house on the street this holiday season with LIFX Outdoor Permanent Lights. Designed to be installed once and left up all year round, these lights are built to last and blend in seamlessly with their classic white cabling and casing.

devices.name: LIFX Neon Outdoor
devices.feature_text: Just another light? No, a LIFX SuperColour Neon Light. This is unlike any outdoor light you've ever seen. Neon Flex contains all the premium RGBW LEDs LIFX is famous for in a wet location rated 5m. strip light. Like a genuine old-school neon light, with glowing colour and stunning whites in a bendable matte silicone perfect for shaping.

devices.name: LIFX Ceiling 13x26"
devices.feature_text: A smart, simple, extra bright (5200 lm), color ceiling capsule light can take bedrooms to sleep-pods; kitchen tables to dining events; and living rooms to cinemas. Watch the clouds roll by with morphing effects or paint on custom colors directly from the app. Control with voice, app, sensors (not included) and partner integrations. With Wi-Fi, you don't need a bridge or hub to set it up, just onboard with the LIFX App. No extra bits of hardware will be cluttering up your surfaces – the ceiling light works straight out of the box. Works with Alexa, Google, Apple HomeKit, and more.

devices.name: LIFX Candle (B10)
devices.feature_text: Create light that looks "fire". Literally. Or like lava, a sunset, a jungle canopy or a melted rainbow in a bottle... Whatever you're into. It's not all play though – for everyday lighting, pick from our ultra-broad industry leading range of whites.

Perfect as a tabletop companion or mounted on the wall, Luna combines unmatched simplicity and powerful functionality, delivering vibrant Polychrome lighting effects with seamless smart functionality. At 1000 lumens, it’s bright enough to light your workspace yet dimmable for a cozy nightstand glow.

devices.feature_text: This is a lighting fixture providing  you with a  vivid LIFX colour and tunable warm to cool whites everywhere in your home. The LIFX 100mm Downlight produces 800 lumens from just 13 watts.

The LIFX Downlight Color produces a staggering 800 lumens from just 9 watts, delivers advanced WiFi enabled control, and creates a modern flush-to-ceiling finish with its retrofit fixtures for a sophisticated home.

devices.name: CPX Smart Panel
devices.feature_text: The 2X4 Lithonia Connect Smart CPX with motion sensor is the perfect way to get connected with your smart home lighting solution. Lithonia Connect uses Bluetooth or Zigbee to pair to your mobile device or compatible smart home hubs. Lithonia Connect is also certified with SmartThings, Alexa and Google Home platforms once installed. When paired with a compatible smart home hub you can enable voice control, time schedules, control motion timer, and groups to control the lighting throughout your home. Once installed, it’s simple and easy to customize your lighting with tunable white color control (2700K to 5000K), dimming down to 1% to set the perfect mood, and on/off control. The “XX” characters in the product SKU denote one of the following packaging formats: “M6” – Master pack of 6 units; “M2” – Master pack of 2 units.

devices.name: Essentials Smart Recessed Downlight

Whether working from home, or looking to set a relaxing nighttime ambience, the Nanoleaf Essentials Smart Recessed Downlight provides you with the perfect light for every situation, all with the seamless and intuitive app, voice control, or the time-based automated Circadian Lighting feature. Access lightning fast speed and robust reliability over the Thread network with any eligible Thread border router, while enjoying a truly integrated smart home over Matter.

devices.name: Smart Holiday String Lights

Customize color palettes and lighting animations to set the mood and you can even sync your lights with your favorite songs to watch them dance to the beat! Designed for both indoor and outdoor use (IP44).

devices.name: Nanoleaf 4D
devices.feature_text: Choose from 4 Screen Mirror modes with varying degrees of immersion to best suit what you're watching—from ambient background lighting, to fluid color melts, and finally a direct 4D match for the highest impact. Add Rhythm sound reactivity to any screen mirror mode to bring your favorite music videos and soundtracks to life!

devices.name: Essentials Outdoor Lights
devices.feature_text: Light up your outdoors all year round with our Smart Multicolor Permanent Outdoor Lights. These LED lights are crafted for durability and seamlessly blend into your home's exterior during the day. Come nightfall, transform your surroundings with vivid and vibrant lighting effects. Install along eaves and soffits to enhance the esthetic appeal and safety of your home. Included screws are required for reinforcement and permanent mounting.

devices.name: BRB70F26CEF0EO
devices.feature_text: Reduce power consumption by up to 10%* with AI Energy Mode**. If your estimated electricity bill exceeds your planned target, you have the option to set energy-saving options***. The unit optimizes the compressor speed and defrost cycle based on your usage pattern and environment.

devices.name: BRB70F26BDS0EF
devices.feature_text: The Samsung BRB70F26BDS0 built-in refrigerator combines advanced technology, efficiency and convenience to offer you maximum freshness. With a capacity of 264 liters and an energy class D, it is designed to reduce energy consumption without compromising on performance. Thanks to the Total No Frost system, forget about ice formation: uniform cooling prevents temperature changes, keeping food fresh for longer. The Twin Cooling Plus technology guarantees independent control of temperature and humidity between the refrigerator and freezer, preserving the flavor of food in the best possible way. The Cool Select Plus function offers maximum versatility: you can convert the freezer compartment into a refrigerator to adapt to space and storage needs. The dedicated Humidity Fresh and Optimal Fresh drawers ensure optimal conditions for fresh foods such as fruits, vegetables and meat, extending their shelf life. Wi-Fi connectivity allows you to monitor and adjust refrigerator settings remotely, directly from your smartphone, for a personalized experience that is always under control.

devices.name: BRB70F26C1S0UA
devices.feature_text: Reduce power consumption by up to 10%* with AI Energy mode**. If your average electricity bill exceeds your limit, it will help you save***. AI Energy mode optimizes compressor speed and defrost cycle depending on usage and environment.

devices.name: BRB80F26ACF0EF
devices.feature_text: With AI Energy Mode*, you can easily check your power consumption. When AI Energy Mode is activated, the refrigerator remembers user behavior and optimizes the compressor speed and the automatic defrost function in the freezer compartment based on this. This can save up to 10% energy.

devices.name: BRB80F26C1F0WT
devices.feature_text: Samsung's Built-in Bottom Freezer Fridge is the perfect combination of advanced technology and high functionality. This refrigerator, made in Poland, features a modern design and excellent features that will satisfy the highest demands of customers.

devices.name: BRB80F30A1S0UA

Dead spots be dead.

The Z-Wave smoke detector detects resulting fire and smoke emission reliable.

Thanks to Z-Wave wireless technology you can define further actions triggered by the Smart Home control center in case of an alarm. To enhance safety, escape routes can be highlighted with automated lighting and unlocking or locking of shutters and doors. 

Thank to its integrated 10-years battery the smoke detector can be used for legally prescribed lifecycle without replacing the main battery. The Z-Wave modules battery can be replaced with just a few simple steps when the device informs the control center about low battery status. Low Z-Wave module battery has no influence to the smoke sensors functionality.
This device is the first smoke sensor with Z-Wave which has the Q-label for extended quality.

devices.name: Nano Switch
devices.feature_text: Introducing the Aeotec Pico integrated with SmartThings Switch Series, revolutionizing your home into a cutting-edge, intelligent haven. Say goodbye to antiquated switches and embrace a new era of comfort, convenience, and control. Furthermore, the Pico Series, powered by Zigbee and Matter technology, offers retrofittable in-wall switches for monitoring and managing socket or light energy consumption, seamlessly integrated with SmartThings for your Smart Home experience.

devices.name: Nano Switch with Power Metering
devices.feature_text: Aeotec Nano Switch with power metering allows you to automate, schedule and manually control any of your home’s wall switches or power outlets using Z-Wave gateways, hubs and apps.

devices.name: Smart Dimmer 6
devices.feature_text: Aeotec’s range of intelligent, automation controllers doesn’t end here. From smart plugs to wireless wall switches and water sensors, it’s a range that keeps you in control and ensures that automation systems are always an intelligent enhancement.

devices.name: Dual Nano Switch
devices.feature_text: Invisible, controlling, and responsive tool that installs behind a switch or socket lets you control, monitor, automate, and schedule the electronics in your home. devices.name: Nano Dimmer
devices.feature_text: Nano Dimmer dramatically improves the lighting in your home. Our 3rd generation of invisible lighting controller outperforms all that has come before it. Dimming is smoother. Compatibility is broader. Lighting is faster and more responsive. Automation and intelligence have never been more powerful. And it comes in such a small size, that you’ll be amazed at just how much functionality we were able to craft inside.

devices.feature_text: It’s the Z-Wave smart switch that you can use indoors out outdoors. More has been done to Heavy Duty Smart Switch than simply waterproofing it for outdoor use. It’s also been crafted with all the technology necessary for it to perform outdoors flawlessly; a long-range antenna capable of communicating over 150 metres (490 feet) outdoors, and a Z-Wave repeater so that it can also communicate with other Z-Wave devices installed outdoors.

With an array of tutorials available for everything from single-switch to multi-way installations, illumino Dimmer Switch is simple to wire. In the event that you’re not sure which wire goes where, or cannot identify Line from Load, Aeotec’s support team can guide you.

The weather-resistant housing with a protective outlet cover safeguards the outlet from dirt and debris when not in use. The discreet black color blends in with any outdoor environment. Perfect for decorative or seasonal lighting, fountains and other outdoor plug-in appliances. Take control of your home lighting with GE Z-Wave Smart Lighting Controls!

As a replacement for your current light switch, this wireless control switch allows you to turn on/off or dim incandescent lighting. You can control one room or your entire house. With Home technology, you can monitor and control your lights even when you’re not home—all from any Internet-enabled smart phone, tablet or computer.

devices.name: Z-Wave In-Wall Smart Switch
devices.feature_text: Transform any home into a smart home with the GE Z-Wave Smart Lighting Control On/Off Switch. The on/off switch replaces your current light switch, uses your existing wiring, and provides Z-Wave wireless and in-wall control of overhead lighting. The switch enables wireless control of on/off functions of direct wire incandescent, LED, xenon, halogen and fluorescent lighting. Providing ultimate flexibility, the GE Z-Wave Smart Lighting Control On/Off Switch allows you to operate the switch by itself or easily integrate the switch with two-way, three-way or four-way wiring configurations by adding the GE Auxiliary switch for Z-Wave. Two-way, Three-way, and Four-way wiring configuration turns the light or appliance on/off from one, two, or three locations. The GE Auxiliary Switch for Z-Wave is required for Three-way or Four-way installations. The lighting control includes a blue LED indicator light to easily locate the switch in a dark room.

devices.name: In-Wall Smart Dimmer (Z-Wave)

devices.name: Radiant Smart Switch
devices.feature_text: Take comfort in the convenience of controlling your lights from any smart device, whether you're home or not. The Smart Switch with Matter enables you to control your lights and set scenes and schedules using any Matter-compliant smart home platform. Combining classic design and advanced functionality with a simple connection to your existing smart home solution using your home's existing wireless network. Boasting advanced functionality with a simple connection among existing smart home solutions on your home's wireless network, Smart Lighting from the radiant® Collection sets the exact lighting you want – when and where you need it.

devices.name: Radiant Smart LED Dimmer
devices.feature_text: Take comfort in the convenience of controlling your lights from any smart device, whether you're home or not. The Smart LED Dimmer with Matter offers precise light level control, and the ability to set scenes and schedules from any Matter-compliant smart home platform. Combining classic design and advanced functionality with a simple connection to your existing smart home solution using your home's existing wireless network, Smart Lighting from the radiant® Collection sets the exact lighting you want – when and where you need it. Lumina RF products ensure energy savings in new construction and retrofits and the Lumina Gateway functions as an energy management coordinator, allowing for wireless automated control of loads via remote control from a tablet or smartphone app.

devices.name: Leviton In-Wall 15A Switch with Z-Wave Plus
devices.feature_text: The Leviton DZ15S is a Z-Wave Plus enabled universal switch designed for residential lighting applications. It uses the latest generation of Leviton’s technology for smart lighting control, engineered to function with extremely sensitive, low-wattage light sources, such as a single LED bulb in a hallway or a strand of holiday lights, ensuring LEDs do not glow when off. The DZ15S is fully compatible with Wink, SmartThings and Amazon Echo (requires Wink or SmartThings Hub), as well as all other certified Z-Wave controllers, security systems, gateways, and hubs. Attach one or multiple DZ15S devices to these controllers to provide automation and remote access. Application: Supports LED and CFL technologies up to 600 Watts with support for legacy incandescent lighting loads up to 1800 Watts, along with support for Fluorescent, Resistive, and Motor loads. In addition to universal lighting support, the DZ15S features two-way feedback, is scene capable, and is Z-Wave Plus certified, ensuring the latest technology, increased communication range, network wide inclusion, and over the air updates. Also features transient surge suppression built-in. Can be used in 3-way, multi-way circuit by using matching DD0SR-DL or coordinating DD0SR-1 remote switch.

devices.name: Magnetic Low Voltage Dimmer (Discontinued)

Renoir is a preset Decora brand style slide dimmer. These devices feature classic architectural fin design with screwless Snap-On covers and they are available for incandescent, magnetic low-voltage and fluorescent lighting control. An excellent energy-saving solution for large living areas with groups of recessed incandescent lighting fixtures. Ideal for Chandeliers and Track Lighting. 1000Va 800W, 120 Volt AC 60Hz, Single-Pole, Renoir Preset Electro-Mechanical Magnetic Low-Voltage Slide Dimmer, Narrow Fin, White

devices.name: Leviton Z-Wave Dimmer In-Wall DZ1KD (Discontinued)
devices.feature_text:
The Leviton DZ1KD is a Z-Wave Plus enabled universal dimmer designed for residential lighting applications. It uses the latest generation of Leviton’s dimming technology for smart lighting control, engineered to function with extremely sensitive, low-wattage light sources, such as a single LED bulb in a hallway or a strand of holiday lights, ensuring LEDs do not glow when off. The DZ1KD is fully compatible with Wink, SmartThings and Amazon Echo (requires Wink or SmartThings Hub), as well as all other certified Z-Wave controllers, security systems, gateways, and hubs. Attach one or multiple DZ1KD devices to these controllers to provide automation and remote access.
In addition to universal lighting support, the DZ1KD features two-way feedback, is scene capable, and is Z-Wave Plus certified, ensuring the latest technology, increased communication range, network wide inclusion, and over the air updates. Includes 49 different fade rates and features user pre-sets for powering on and minimum brightness. Also features transient surge suppression built-in. Can be used in 3-way, multi-way circuit by using matching DD00R-DL remote dimmer. The UL required air gap switch disconnects power from load locally. It is concealed during normal operation and is accessible without moving the wall plate.

devices.name: Zigbee 3.0 15A Switch
devices.feature_text: Leviton’s Decora Smart family of Zigbee enabled lighting controls are the perfect addition to any smart home automation system using a Zigbee hub, gateway, or controller. The DG15S Decora Smart 15A Switch is Zigbee 3.0 certified and includes the latest in Zigbee technology for inter-operability and network security. Zigbee uses mesh networking technology to provide quick, reliable, and secure communication to a wide variety of Zigbee certified smart products such as sensors, thermostats, locks, and more. The DG15S provides On and Off of connected lighting via the manual Decora rocker switch or can be controlled wirelessly as part of a Zigbee network. The DG15S is also compatible with a wide variety of load types such as Incandescent, LED/CFL, and Fluorescent. The DG15S is built for performance with a 15A relay and is also rated for ½ HP motor loads. Have Questions? Search the knowledge base.

Customize with adjustable fade rates, maximum/minimum illumination levels, and more. Supports dimmable LED and CFL technologies up to 300 Watts, and legacy incandescent lighting loads up to 600 Watts. Multi-location (3-way) dimming is achieved using up to 4 remote units, DD00R-DLZ. devices.name: Lumina RF 0-10V Dimming Wall Switch (Discontinued)
devices.feature_text: Introducing the Lumina™ RF Decora® 0-10V Wall Switch Dimmer (ZSD07), a line-powered component of the Lumina RF Solutions product line. This device allows dimming of any 0-10V controlled load. Use as a standalone dimmer or part of the Lumina RF Eco-System. Lumina RF products ensure energy savings in new construction and retrofits and the Lumina Gateway functions as an energy management coordinator, allowing for wireless automated control of loads via remote control from a tablet or smartphone app. The ZSD07 is a robust manual rocker dimmer switch used to provide wireless control of lighting loads including high-inrush LED loads. The ZSD07 Wall Dimmer is compatible with 2.4 GHz Lumina RF wireless products. When connected with a Lumina Gateway it allows facilities to create scalable wireless energy management systems. Connect other Lumina RF devices and add the OmniTouch 7 Touchscreen Interface for seamless centralized control, scheduling and remote access. The ZSD07 is the optimal solution for retrofit applications where LED, incandescent or fluorescent lighting controls are required and additional wiring devices are costprohibitive.

devices.feature_text: Control your KONOz Thermostat and other connected devices with your home automation app for Iphone or Android.

devices.name: Nest Learning Thermostat
devices.feature_text: The Nest Thermostat does. Since 2011, we estimate that it’s saved over 39 billion kWh of energy in millions of homes worldwide. Because it learns from you. It gets to know the temperature you like when you’re at home. And turns itself down when you’re away. It even learns how your home warms up or how draughty it is, so it only uses the energy it needs. That’s how the Nest Thermostat saves energy.

devices.name: Nest Smart Programmable Wi-Fi Thermostat
devices.feature_text: Google Nest Thermostat - Smart Thermostat for Home - Programmable Wifi Thermostat - Snow

devices.name: Smart Thermostat
devices.feature_text: Create an ecosystem tailored to your needs. Access your Netatmo comfort products and their features in the Home + Control or Energy app, with no subscription fees or any extra costs.

devices.name: Smart Radiator Valve
devices.feature_text: Enjoy a comfortable and energy-efficient home using the smart features, which can be easily set up through the app. For example, the Open Window Detection feature turns off the radiators automatically when the windows are open.

devices.name: Wi-Fi Thermostat
devices.feature_text: Your thermostat is the brain of your HVAC system. If it doesn’t match the complexity of the equipment, you’re losing out on a lot of options. These options contribute to your energy costs and home comfort.

devices.name: Radiator Thermostat Valve
devices.feature_text: Thermostatic Radiator Valve, 2Pcs Thermostatic Valves Head Only, Radiator Thermostat Head M30 x 1.5, Standard Radiator Valves Replacement Head for Home Office

devices.name: Smart Thermostat (Zigbee)
devices.feature_text: Automate your heating with an individual schedule. The POPP Smart Thermostat switches off automatically when you leave the house. Did you forget to close the window and turn off the heating? No problem, the POPP Smart Thermostat detects open windows and automatically turns down your heating radiators.

devices.name: Sensi Smart Thermostat
devices.feature_text: You can feel confident and comfortable about installing Sensi yourself. The Sensi smart thermostat does not require a common wire (c-wire) for most systems and our easy-to-use app will walk you through the step-by-step process quickly.

devices.name: Sensi Touch
devices.feature_text: The award-winning Sensi Touch smart thermostat focuses on providing the best homeowner experience including a large color touch screen, easy set-up, intuitive controls and compatibility with popular home automation systems.

devices.name: Sensi Touch 2
devices.feature_text: With a new modern design, enhanced user experience and compatibility with room sensors, this thermostat proves why Sensi smart thermostats are top rated by consumers.

devices.name: Sensi Lite

devices.name: Orleans High-End Convector
devices.feature_text: Delivers 500 watts of power, perfect for smaller spaces, ensuring consistent and reliable warmth.

devices.name: Ki Thermostat (Z-Wave)
devices.feature_text: The Ki-Z-Wave thermostat lets you control the temperature of the rooms in your home remotely. Designed and developed especially for the smart home, this thermostat can control electric baseboards and convectors, but unlike the Ki Zigbee model, its protocol does not allow it to communicate with fan heaters.

devices.name: 4000 W KI Thermostat
devices.feature_text: The Ki thermostat for the smart home is the first ever Z-Wave line voltage thermostat in North America. Ki thermostats can easily be integrated into the Z-Wave network of your home, allowing you to adjust the temperature in rooms of your home from a distance. The Z-Wave technology also allows you to activate scenes, setting in motion several actions such as adjusting the temperature and lighting, activation of safety andentertainment systems and more.

devices.name: Maestro Smart Thermostat (Zigbee)
devices.feature_text: Pair the Maestro thermostat with the Maestro controller•thermostat and make your home a smart home in a snap! In tandem, the two devices can help your home reach its full potential. It can also be connected to a Zigbee network managed by a compatible controller. Maestro: the comfort solution for the smart home!

devices.name: Orleans Fan-Heater
devices.feature_text: The Orléans fan heater, the quietest unit in its class, features a boost mode that ensures a fast temperature rise. Enjoy your moments of relaxation with total peace of mind. Like our Orléans convector, this unit is equipped with the Zigbee protocol.

devices.name: Smart Radiator Thermostat X
devices.feature_text: Control your radiators from anywhere with ease using the powerful tado° app. Save energy effortlessly – with future-proof technology by the experts.

devices.name: Smart Thermostat X
devices.feature_text: Replace your existing room thermostats yourself in just a few steps and control the temperature with ease using our app or your smart speaker.

devices.name: XL624 Z-Wave Thermostat
devices.feature_text: Compatible with Nexia smart home, this 7-day programmable, touchscreen thermostat can be used to remotely control your home's temperature to suit your lifestyle and reduce your cooling and heating energy usage. The Trane XL624 connects you with your home comfort even when you are away.

devices.name: Vimar Smart Thermostat
devices.feature_text: The new thermostats can be controlled in various ways: locally, by operating the device itself via smartphone, using the View or By-web Apps (for KNX systems) which allow you to manage and programme the temperature in various environments, even when you are out. For the By-me Plus systems, control via voice assistants is also enabled, as is the integration with the IFTTT service, which paves the way towards partnerships with third-party manufacturers to expand the number of devices that can be integrated, enhancing domestic comfort and optimising consumption levels. This completes Vimar’s temperature control range, designed for any type of system: stand alone, smart and home automation systems for state-of-the-art integrated systems.

devices.name: Zen Thermostat
devices.feature_text: Zen Thermostat™ is a smart home automation tool that fits beautifully into your home or office environment. The LED screen provides clear and simple feedback. Icons only display when they are required. When left inactive, the display simply fades away. Zen Thermostat™ is available in black or white so it blends seamlessly into your existing interior design.

devices.name: Water Main Shut-off Valve
devices.feature_text: On-demand control from anywhere using your smart home hub's mobile app. Seamlessly integrates with Wink, SmartThings, Home Seer, Nexia, and other hubs

devices.name: Bulldog Valve Robot
devices.feature_text: The EcoNet Controls Bulldog Smart Water Shutoff Kit is a versatile and expandable smart home solution designed to help protect your home from water damage. The Bulldog Z-Wave Plus Certified Water Shut-Off Controller automatically shuts off your water supply when any of the included Zigbee leak sensors detect a leak, helping to minimize water damage and potential repair costs. This kit includes a compatible Aeotec Hub, ensuring compatibility with SmartThings for smooth integration into your smart home setup. It is compatible with Amazon Alexa and is compatible with Google Home, allowing you to control your water. With reliable leak detection and water shut-off functionality, this kit offers peace of mind and is an excellent start to any smart home setup. With a Z-Wave hub, future Z-Wave plus compatible devices can be added to your smart home setup to not only increase its range, but provide extra functionality and customization.

devices.name: Water Valve
devices.feature_text: There are thousands of interoperable Z-Wave products throughout the world, and over 94 million Z-Wave products have been sold since our beginnings in 2001. All of them work together regardless of brand, because they're all based on the common Z-Wave standard. Browse our Product Finder to see what Z-Wave can do for you.
